creator: ross@daemon-notes.com
text:
Build error in xbmc port:

# cd /usr/ports/multimedia/xbmc
# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for xbmc-12.0.r3:
     AVAHI=off: Zeroconf via Avahi
     EXTERNAL_FFMPEG=off: Use external ffmpeg
     HAL=off: HAL (Hardware Abstraction Layer)
     LIBBLURAY=on: Blu-ray discs via libbluray
     LIRC=off: LIRC support
     NONFREE=on: Enable non-free components (rar, ccx, ffmpeg)
     PULSEAUDIO=off: PulseAudio sound server
     RTMP=on: RTMP protocol via librtmp
     VAAPI=off: VAAPI (GPU video acceleration)
     VDPAU=on: VDPAU (GPU video acceleration)
     WEBSERVER=off: Build and/or install internal web server
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

# make
..
EncoderFFmpeg.cpp: In member function 'virtual bool CEncoderFFmpeg::Init(const char*, int, int, int)':
EncoderFFmpeg.cpp:80: error: 'AVIO_FLAG_READ' was not declared in this scope
gmake[1]: *** [EncoderFFmpeg.o] Error 1
gmake: *** [xbmc/cdrip/cdrip.a] Error 2
gmake: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
..
CPP     xbmc/addons/Skin.o
CPP     xbmc/addons/Visualisation.o
AR      xbmc/addons/addons.a
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/xbmc.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/xbmc.

How-To-Repeat: Try to build the port
